name: Shakey's Pizza Asia Ventures, Inc.
summary: Shakey's Pizza Asia Ventures, Inc. owns and operates chained pizza and chained full-service restaurants in the Philippines. It operates through three segments: Restaurant Sales, Franchise and Royalty Fees, and Commissary Sales. The company's restaurants offer pizzas, group meals, chicken N' mojos, pasta, starters, drinks, and soups and salads; and fresh and frozen pan-baked and baked breads, pastries, cakes, desserts, confectionery items, pie crusts, and party shells. As of February 23, 2021, it operated 245 company-owned restaurants. The company was formerly known as International Family Food Services, Inc. and changed its name to Shakey's Pizza Asia Ventures, Inc. in October 2016. The company was founded in 1954 and is headquartered in Paranaque, the Philippines. Shakey's Pizza Asia Ventures, Inc. is a subsidiary of Century Pacific Group, Inc.
